targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM routing_events GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp AS time, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM dns_events GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT detected_at, alert_type, severity, prefix, origin_as, event_count FROM bgp_alerts ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT detected_at, alert_type, severity, source_ip, event_count FROM dns_alerts ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 20
